reviews.review_description:
This version is very well done and visually beautiful. 
The atmosphere is relaxing, immersive, and the environments feel carefully crafted. The music also fits perfectly with the experience.

The only real pity is that it lasts only around 10 minutes. It feels too short for such a beautiful journey, and I honestly wanted it to continue much longer.

PLEASE MAKE IT 20 OR 25 MINUTES!!! 
SEE THE COMPETITORS (RELAX RIVER 2)

SOMETHING ELSE: It would also be wonderful if future versions included different weather and lighting options, like a rising sun at dawn or even a rainy-day version. 
Those additions could make the experience feel even more magical and replayable.
Overall, an excellent VR experience — just too short

reviews.review_title: Relax River 1 glitch. Now a part 2?
reviews.review_description: I bought relax River one along with their Dream Journey that came out the same time. Both have glitches were white lines go down the center of the screen.  Especially during night mode. Those should be fixed before you make another version I believe.

reviews.review_title: you get what you pay for
reviews.review_description: Its okay for the price I guess. the boat moves a bit slowly. I would love if it has  a speed option.  also why in the world does it take you to the sky whenever you pause?? also wish i had the option to row the boat.

I expected so much more, a longer ride, more critters, etc. While it was beautiful it wasn’t worth $3.99, .99 at best. The rocks like fabulous in the distance then fade together in a blur as you get closer. I loved to turtles and fish in the beginning and horses at the end, I probably won’t ride again.
I found this and the relaxing waterfalls app to be so calming and peaceful, my favourite apps so far, please do more!! 🙏🏼
Very peaceful along with beautiful music. The music is perfect for this experience, and it will put you in a good place. You will Love the animals you will see on the river ride. Thank you very much.

I really like this one, feeling calm and relax.
Can they develop more virtual environments, like floating in the sea, or travel around. I would happy to purchase more!

Seriously: all 5 star reviews? This app was so disappointing . You could see the layers!! No shadows in the water from those rocks. At times it looked like the rocks would levitate up Ito the sky because it looked like there was an air space between them.    
And the water. ￼  The video was choppy up in the sky. This was supposed to relax me at 3am when I couldnt sleep but it cause great anxiety. Requesting a refund

developer_response.body:
Dear user,
We're sorry to hear that your experience didn't meet your expectations. This app was originally developed in 2016 for Google Cardboard and was later ported to Meta Quest following numerous requests from our loyal community (over 500,000 downloads). We acknowledge the technical limitations compared to current standards, which is why we've chosen to keep the price very affordable.
Despite its visual simplicity, the app continues to be appreciated by many users, showing that — especially in relaxing VR experiences — atmosphere and mood can matter just as much as graphics.
A new version, Relax River 2, is now available. It features upgraded graphics, improved performance, and takes full advantage of the capabilities of the latest generation of VR headsets.
Thank you for your feedback; it's always valuable to us.

reviews.review_description: Too short 👍 is their more like this

This app is great! Are you anxious? Stressed out? Upset? Start this app, and within a few minutes as your boat gently drifts down the river, with soothing music and soft sounds of nature in the background, you'll feel de-stressed and relaxed. It's so nice and soothing! In fact, you may find yourself falling asleep after a few minutes. LOL Don't expect a fancy, thrills-filled app. This is just simple and basic. But it's so nice!! Oh, and there are two modes: day mode and night mode. Night mode is especially relaxing.

I found it very relaxing. Exactly like the app I used years ago with my phone and foam headset.
I was disappointed with the quality graphics. Hopefully  this will improve and have more features in the future such as controlling music, ambient sounds and visuals. The price is reasonable
Loved the environment of the river, but think that there should be some options for the speed of the movement:  slow, normal, and fast
Sometimes you just want to chill in a VR world or show something off to a friend. This is perfect for days like that. Just sit back and enjoy they ride.

This feels like the app I wanted when I bought a VR headset. It's a leisurely boat ride on a beautiful river, full of gentle surprises, ambient sounds, and peaceful music. You can take a night journey or a day journey. Both are well worth doing! Thank you!

A few years ago, I reached out to the app developers and begged them to bring this to the Quest platform (originally, this app was only available on Oculus GO).  They promised me that they will do their best to get it on the Quest.  

Now here it is & it's also available on Q3.  Thank you so much..  It was well worth waiting for.❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️
A gorgeous soothing boat ride along a varied landscape, with lots of interesting creatures to admire. Very enjoyable fifteen minute journey, with different beings to experience by day and by night.
I’ve been looking for a peaceful boating and relaxing experience. By far this is truly the best experience and the most relaxing.
Beautifull❤️

This was very well done.   I love you can turnoff the music and hear the water and nature.  The speed was perfect, and I love the surprises that come alone the route for both night and day.  The only suggestion/request would be to  choose how long it last or to have it loop over until you stop it.  New sceens would be great too, as ad-ons if possible!
I
The best relaxing application I have. I enjoy it at least once a day, and would easily buy every program they put out.

Loved this when I had a Go and never saw it when I had a quest 2, now I have a quest 3 and re-bought. 
 Love it when pausing the game and you shoot up in the air 30ft..great memories once again to be relived :)

I totally started to fall asleep going down the river. Whether day or night is was very pleasing. Loved the few animals and the ones at the end were a nice surprise! Night could be a little brighter, just a little. I enjoyed it a lot. However I can't see myself using this a lot to relax. But very good for once in awhile. 
   Great job!
Loved it!! I wanted to rest my legs on sides of boat and also go for a swim.
So relaxing and beautiful!

reviews.review_title: Love to relax on daylight and night
reviews.review_description: It’s short, but it’s worth, I absolutely loved it!

Had this on the gear vr and used to use ot during chemo treatments.  Just got a quest 2 and got this again.  Good display, could do with a hit more updating for more realism but it's a lovely app that anyone can enjoy.  Elders will love this also

I used to have this VR app on google cardboard loved it then, and now it’s available on Meta Quest 3 it’s a dream come true. This is so relaxing just sitting on the boat you can choose day or night for your ride along the river while surrounded by nature it’s so peaceful and relaxing so I’ve given this VR app a well deserved five star rating Thank you to the developers for bringing this VR app to Meta Quest 3
This was so relaxing!
